description_long: This is a small, rounded white cup with a wide body and a flat base, featuring a sturdy, polygonal handle. The cup is adorned with playful penguin illustrations and Korean text, giving it a whimsical and personalized appearance. The handle also displays a small penguin motif, adding to the decorative charm. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramic. The cup has a fitted lid that matches the body in color and finish, suggesting it is designed to keep contents warm or prevent spills. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for casual or themed urban environments.
description: A white, rounded cup with a lid, penguin illustrations, and a polygonal handle, featuring smooth, glossy ceramic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main penguin illustration, Korean text, and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the handle, which displays a small penguin motif, with the lid visible on top.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the main illustration and text visible on the cup's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting a large penguin illustration holding a yellow object, with no handle visible.
